case_title: ERIC GESLIEN et al VS. MAYUKO Y. MIH et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,016.13 FILED BY GESLIEN, ERIC GESLIEN, CHRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT MIH, MAYUKO Y. J. WAVRO ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED SEP-21-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MIH, MAYUKO Y.
CASE DISMISSED AS TO MAYUKO Y. MIH BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-19-2011 AT 10:00AM. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED SEP-21-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT J. WAVRO ASSOCIATES
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY GESLIEN, ERIC GESLIEN, CHRISTINA MIH, MAYUKO Y. J. WAVRO ASSOCIATES
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2011 BY DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: B. PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GESLIEN, ERIC GESLIEN, CHRISTINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIH, MAYUKO Y. $1,016.13 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,086.13 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2011 - JUDGMENT.
